description_long: This is a modern L-shaped chaise with a sleek, minimalist design, featuring a smooth, glossy surface that suggests a leather or faux-leather upholstery. The chaise has a left-side extended lounge section and a right-side two-seat sofa section, both with thick, plush seat and back cushions. The backrest is continuous and slightly curved, providing ergonomic support, and is divided into three segments for added comfort. Both ends of the chaise have low, padded armrests that are integrated into the overall form. The legs are short, tapered, and likely made of metal or dark-finished wood, giving the piece a slightly elevated stance. The overall appearance is contemporary and would fit well in upscale urban environments such as lobbies, lounges, or modern apartments.
description: A modern L-shaped chaise with glossy, smooth upholstery, plush segmented cushions, and short tapered legs, featuring integrated low armrests.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, plush seat and back cushions, and both low armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended lounge section and the thickness of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, segmented backrest and the chaise's overall length.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the two-seat section and the right armrest.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is continuous, moderately high, and slightly curved, segmented into three sections for ergonomic support. It has a smooth, unadorned surface with no visible tufting or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both ends, low and padded, integrated into the overall form of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, tapered, and likely made of metal or dark-finished wood, with a simple, modern design and no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid and smooth with a glossy finish, showing no visible pattern, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are three main seat cushions and three backrest cushions, all attached and forming a continuous, plush surface. The left section extends outward as a lounge, while the right section forms a standard sofa seat.
